# ASN prefix map — CIDR to ASN mapping for offline lookup
# Format: <CIDR> <ASN>
# Longest prefix match is used.
# Last updated: 2026-03-16
# Source: curated from IANA / RIR delegated data + operator knowledge
# NOTE: For production, replace with a full BGP feed (e.g. routeviews.org, RIPE RIS)
